ocr_findings.description: Callout box label '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' in OCR — 'コレ' (katakana: this) misread as 'つし' (hiragana + kanji fragment). Changes the meaning of the label slightly; content inside the box is correct.
Illustration (person at computer with robot) replaced by '![img-0.jpeg]' placeholder; no text content in the illustration.
Mascot/icon image for 試験にはコレが出る！ box replaced by '![img-1.jpeg]' placeholder; cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 06-06 opening page on 運用プロセスと保守プロセス. Main body text and the 5-process sequence callout are accurately captured. The wrong_char issue in the callout heading label ('コレ'→'つし') is a known OCR kana/katakana confusion but does not affect the body content of the box.
